description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, reminiscent of the classic Les Paul shape. The body is finished in a uniform gray color, with a smooth, glossy surface and rounded contours. The front features two humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and three control knobs, all in black, along with a fixed bridge and six strings. The neck is long and slender, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and dot inlays, leading up to a headstock with three tuning pegs on each side. The back of the guitar is plain, lacking any visible electronics covers or decorative elements. The overall construction suggests a combination of wood for the body and neck, metal for the hardware, and plastic for the knobs and pickup covers.
description: A solid-body, single-cutaway electric guitar in gray with black hardware, two humbucker pickups, and a classic headstock with six tuning pegs. The surface is glossy and smooth, with a modern, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gray body, two black humbucker pickups, three control knobs, toggle switch, bridge, and six strings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the guitar's slim profile and the thickness of the body, with hardware slightly protruding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain gray back of the guitar, with no visible electronics covers or decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the body’s thickness, with minimal hardware visible.
attribute_headstock_design: Three-per-side tuning peg arrangement, black faceplate, no visible logo, classic Les Paul-style contour
